design_philosophy: Objective, rigid, function-first, with radical weight contrast. The Kenbot dashboard is the nerve center of the dealership's automated inventory management. Color is used strictly for data mapping and system status, never for decoration.

typography.strategy: Swiss Brutalist - strong weight contrast between headings (Black/Bold) and body (Regular). Tight tracking on headings.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Dense but structured. The 'Control Room' grid protocol. High density for charts and tables.

components.cards: Flat solid surfaces with sharp edges (`rounded-none`). 1px solid border (`border-border`). No soft shadows. For hover/active state, a hard shadow block (`shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A]`) and a slight `-translate-y-1`.
components.buttons: Sharp edges, high contrast. Primary: `bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white hover:bg-[#333333] font-bold tracking-wide uppercase text-sm`. Secondary: `border border-[#0A0A0A] bg-transparent text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#F9FAFB] font-bold uppercase text-sm`.
components.tables: Grid borders visible. High density. Monospace fonts for data columns (like IDs, run times, IPs).
components.badges: Square badges, strong background colors with high contrast text. E.g., SUCCESS=Green/White, FAILED=Red/White.
components.inputs: Shadcn standard but overridden to `rounded-none`, clear 1px borders, strong focus rings (`focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0A0A0A]`).
components.charts: Shadcn charts (Recharts) with clean lines, minimal gridlines, tooltips with sharp corners.

motion.loaders: ASCII spinners or stark minimalist geometric pulsing, no colorful bouncing dots.

icons.instructions: Use sharp, unstyled icons. Weight 1.5px. yarn add iconoir-react

image_urls.description: Background for auth screen or subtle hero overlay if needed.
Placeholder image for vehicle listings without photos.

sections.name: Header
sections.details: Sticky header with 'KENBOT' logo (text-based, heavy tracking, font-black), system status indicator (blinking green dot for ONLINE), and main navigation links. Use solid white background with a heavy bottom border.

sections.name: System Status & Overview
sections.details: Bento grid mode B (Control Room). 4 columns. Cards for: Total Vehicles, Active Posts, Needs Photos, Last Cron Run. Use massive typography for metrics (Chivo font).

sections.name: Main Dashboard Area (Split View)
sections.details: Left column (col-span-2): 'Recent Cron Runs Log' - a dense table showing timestamp, action, status, errors. Right column (col-span-1): 'Posts Status' - minimal list or a stark pie chart showing posts with photos vs no photos.

sections.name: Inventory Stats
sections.details: Trend charts showing NEW vs SOLD over the last 30 days. Use monochrome palette for chart lines (black and heavy grey).

sections.name: Settings Panel
sections.details: Forms to manage scraping URLs, Facebook page ID, API keys, AI prompts. Grouped logically. Use sharp inputs with heavy active borders.

sections.name: Architecture Diagram
sections.details: A beautifully styled CSS Grid based diagram showing Kennebec Dodge Website -> Scraper -> AI Generator -> Facebook API. Brutalist styling (sharp boxes, thick dashed connecting lines, arrows). No complex 3D libraries needed, pure HTML/CSS structure.

sections.name: Fix/Changelog Viewer
sections.details: A sharp timeline view mapping version numbers to feature additions and bug fixes. Use monospace fonts for version numbers and dates.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) design rules. This is not a fun consumer app, it is a high-performance administration tool.
Use pure black/white/grey for structural elements, color ONLY for status/data mapping.
All containers, buttons, and inputs MUST use sharp edges (`rounded-none`).
Use grid lines (`border-collapse` style) for data-heavy sections. Apply 1px solid borders (`border-border`) extensively to separate data.
Load 'Chivo' (400, 700, 900), 'IBM Plex Sans' (400, 500), and 'IBM Plex Mono' from Google Fonts.
Integrate Shadcn components but strip their soft default styles (remove border radii, drop shadows, make borders 1px solid black/grey).
Include `data-testid` on all interactive elements as requested for robust automated testing.
Use `iconoir-react` for all iconography, keeping stroke weights consistent (1.5px).
Ensure hover states on interactive elements have stark contrast changes (e.g. `hover:bg-black hover:text-white`).
